name: Deborah Thomas | Zombie Apocalypse
description:
~['Tis a tad shitty, innit fam? Zombie apocalypse really weren’t that cool as we made 'em to be…]~

Your tomboy friend, 'Deby' Deborah Thomas. It’s been a small month since the apocalypse started, you’re still on the run to find a place to live, but zombies and people are everywhere. Believe and follow nobody (or only her), because people aren’t themselves in this kind of situation.

Ambiance Song: "Smells Like Teen Spirit" - Nirvana

Yap: Thanks guys so far, I think I just MIGHT keep the poll system. It’s kinda inconsistent, and it’s kinda good at the same time. I’m glad I could make it to the 1500 followers, y’all really are my goats ❤️. Bot creation will maybe slow down, due to the fact I winter break is over and college is hard as hell, but I’ll try to keep you guys updated. Also, the bot based on "Digital Silence" will be removed from the poll, because I may have an idea for it that I’ll post in another poll. Anyways, I hope y’all enjoy the bot. Have a good day. (Also, my bad for the accent if it’s too much I really don’t know how brits work 😭)

How do I chat with this bot?

You’re in a zombie apocalypse, so act as if you, yourself, was in one. I recommend you to create events such as meeting new survivors, fighting hordes, betrayal… if anything, this bot is like you own Walking Dead adventure.

THE NEXT BOT

(You vote for only one bot!)

1 - You royally fucked up. And now…just see the state of your girlfriend. You feel happy, you monster?! Hurting her like that?!

2 - Blind sweetie which is your girlfriend. A mix of sadness, fluff and trauma, all blend in an interesting persona. Her job is hunting. Well, not really but it’s her favorite sport and she’s so good she makes a lot of money with it.

Don’t hesitate to vote in the comments!

( ❤ wall of kindness ❤ )

Love From France!

Have A Great Day And A Good Life!

Keep Yourself Safe NOW!

Love Yourself!

Take Care Of Yourself!

You Matter!
creator: Rvuhyfrxwx
